au: Jarl; EE compatibility by White Agnus and jastey
no: Tweak pack focused on NPC customization (portraits, soundsets, avatar colors, stats, kits, alignments) plus assorted item and area tweaks. Works on BGT, BG:EE, and EET; several components are BGT-only or BGT+EET-only — see component notes. German is the primary language; English and Russian translations are partial. v2.0.1.
sum: German-first tweak pack: BG2 portraits/soundsets for BG1 NPCs, avatar-color swaps, stat/alignment/kit changes for named NPCs, plus item restorations and area/reputation tweaks.

co.n: Give BGII Cameos their BG1 Portrait: Garrick, Tiax, Xzar, Coran, Safana, Faldorn, Quayle
co.tp2n: BGII-Cameos ihr BG1-Portrait geben: Garrick, Tiax, Xzar, Coran, Safana, Faldorn, Quayle
co.no: BGT and EET only. Compatible with portrait mods that don't rename portrait files.

co.n: Make Mulahey Half-Orc
co.tp2n: Mulahey ist nun im Spiel auch wirklich ein Halbork.
co.no: BGT only — already fixed in EE.

co.n: Give Tazok his appearance and voice from BG2
co.tp2n: Tazok erh�lt das Aussehen und die Stimme aus BG2.
co.no: BGT and EET only.

co.n: Match Avatar Colors of Firebead Elfenhair in Candlekeep and Beregost
co.tp2n: Avatarfarben von Firebead Elfenhaar in Kerzenburg und Beregost werden angeglichen.
co.no: BGT and EET only.

co.n: Special NPC Items (Kivan's Hunting Bow, Korgan's Axe)
co.no: BGT only. Adds Kivan's Hunting Bow (Bandit Camp) and equips Korgan with his named axe.

co.n: More Weapons and Armor for Characters
co.tp2n: Mehr Waffen und Ruestungen fuer Spielcharaktere
co.no: BGT only. Gives Imoen leather armor at lvl 1, Safana 20 throwing daggers, upgrades Berrun Ghastkill's gear to halberd and chain mail.

co.n: Give Eldoth's poisoned arrows and Perdue's short sword custom Item Icons
co.tp2n: Eldoths Giftpfeile und Perdues Kurzschwert erhalten eigene Itemicons.
co.no: BGT only.

co.n: Some BG2 Weapons with generic item icons get custom icons
co.tp2n: Einige BG2 Waffen mit mehrfach vergebenen Itemicons erhalten eigene Icons
co.no: BGT only. Targets SW1H22.ITM (Scimitar +1) and BRUENAXE.ITM (Battle Axe +3).

co.n: Item Addon: Weapon Types from IWD2
co.no: BGT only. Adds handaxe, greataxe, throwing hammer, composite shortbow, and sparking arrows across the trilogy.

co.n: Improved exotic weapons allocation
co.no: BGT only. Reduces Katanas/Wakizashis/Ninja-tos in BG2, adds a few to BG1.

co.n: Restore unique BG1-Items
co.no: BGT only. Restores Battle Axe of Mauletar, Fallorain's Plate, Plate of the Dark, Aule's Staff, Whistling Sword.

co.n: Custom Weapon Sounds
co.no: BGT only. Formerly 'SOUNDPATCH PART I - GAMESOUNDS'. Replaces some projectile and weapon sounds.

co.n: Usable Back Doors for Gellana's Temple and the Temple of Umberlee
co.tp2n: Hintertueren fuer Gellanas Tempel und dem Tempel der Wassekoenigin

co.n: New Searchmap and Wallgroups for Nashkell and Gnoll Fortress
co.tp2n: Neue Searchmap und Wallgroups fuer Nashkell und Gnollfeste
co.no: BGT only. Makes Nashkel graveyard and Gnoll Fortress lower wall ring enterable.

co.n: Make "Lucky Aello's Discount Store" cheap for real
co.tp2n: "Billigladen des Gluecklichen Aello" wird wirklich billig

co.n: Move Dagger of Venom and Shadow Armor from Taerom's Shop to Silence's Shop
co.tp2n: Giftdolch und Schattenruestung gibt es nicht mehr bei Taerom, sondern im "Geschaeft der Stille"

co.n: Make Skull for Melicamp Quest special
co.no: Removes skulls from High Hedge skeleton inventories; places one in Vale of the Tombs crypt.

co.n: Set reputation to 9 after leaving Candlekeep
Adapted Reactions of Flaming Fist after Fight in Duchal Palace
co.tp2n: Angepasste Reaktionen der Flammanden Faust nach dem Kampf im Herzogspalast
co.no: Flaming Fist mercenaries in HQ no longer attack after Duchal Palace fight. By Lumorus.

co.n: Soundpatch for some Characters (German only)
co.tp2n: Soundpatch fuer manche Spielcharaktere (nur deutsche Version)
co.no: German only. Replaces some character voices: Officer Vai, Bjornin, Halbazzer Drin, Davaeorn, Taerom, Chanthalas Ulbright, commoners. Formerly 'SOUNDPATCH PART II - PERSONS'.
